pages.text: Clothcrafting Station is needed to process spools into certain fabric types. This crafting station uses minigame to check your skills, the better you perform - the better $(l:weaversparadise:getting_started/clothcrafting#quality)$(bold)quality$() fabric you will get!

pages.title: Quality
pages.text: Quality of fabric only affects how durable the clothing crafted from it will be. Base item durability is 100, material types get bonus durability as follows:$(br)$(bold)Cotton$() - 20 durability per half a star$(br)$(bold)Silk$() - 15 durability per half a star$(br)$(bold)Wool$() - 25 durability per half a star$(br)$(bold)Jeans$() - 25 durability per half a star
